audit_items.proof_trace: Fork digest correctly incorporates blob parameters via XOR of fork_data_root with hash(blob_params.epoch, blob_params.max_blobs_per_block). For epochs >= fulu_fork_epoch, blob_parameters_for_epoch returns the active blob schedule entry (or electra defaults if schedule empty), ensuring digest changes at BPO fork boundaries. Digest stability within activation epoch ranges is correct by design.
